Vanderboom Legacy

Unravel the mysterious Vanderboom family history across generations. Explore intricate scenes, collect items, and solve interconnected puzzles to progress through the family tree. Each level represents a pivotal moment in the lineage. Interact with objects and use your inventory wisely to unlock secrets and advance the narrative. Complete all levels to reveal the full story.

Arrow Keys: Navigate between interactive objects | Space: Interact with selected object | Z: Cycle through inventory | Shift: Examine inventory item | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart | ENTER: Start game

TEST_2.expected: All levels are completed successfully, the family tree fully unlocks, and the game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state. The final score reflects completion of all levels and any discovered secrets.

TEST_3.test_description: Test edge cases like attempting to use wrong items on objects, navigating with empty inventory, and handling puzzle failures gracefully.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately attempt incorrect solutions, use wrong inventory items on objects, and verify the game provides appropriate feedback without breaking. Test boundary conditions of the interaction system.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game handles all edge cases gracefully with appropriate feedback messages. No crashes occur from invalid interactions. Player can continue playing after mistakes.
